SEARCH
Package microsim.simulation.component.device.timer

Class TimerDevice

java.lang.Object
microsim.simulation.component.SimulationComponent
microsim.simulation.component.BusComponent
microsim.simulation.component.device.IoDevice
microsim.simulation.component.device.ThreadedIoDevice
microsim.simulation.component.device.timer.TimerDevice
public class TimerDevice extends ThreadedIoDevice
Implements a programmable interval timer (PIT) with 3 channels. Device ports are:
  • Timer 0 gate;
  • Timer 1 gate;
  • Timer 2 gate;
  • Timer 0 configuration;
  • Timer 1 configuration;
  • Timer 2 configuration;
Timer configuration is done with a control word where the most significant bit is a periodic flag, and the rest of the word is the max value of the counter.

  • Constructor Details

    • TimerDevice

      public TimerDevice(Bus bus, int base, Simulation simulation)
      Instantiates timer device, taking a reference to the bus it's mounted on and the base address it should respond from.
      Parameters:
      bus - bus the timer device is mounted on
      base - base address of timer device
      simulation - simulation this timer device belongs to

  • Method Details

    • getPort

      public int getPort(int index)
      Returns timer ports. Port 0 is status.
      Specified by:
      getPort in class IoDevice
      Parameters:
      index - index of port
      Returns:
      value port should return

    • setPort

      public void setPort(int index, int data)
